detaileddescription.para: RADLib includes a CMake-invoked Python generator for compact binary TCP protocols.

listitem.para: uint32 messageId in network byte order.
uint32 payloadSize in network byte order.

detaileddescription.para: JSON protocol files define messages and fields. The generator emits C++ structs, message IDs, payload encoders/decoders, and frame helpers. Runtime endpoint configuration remains JSON-loadable through RADNet::endpointConfigFromJson().
